# services.minio

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.minio`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.minio.accessKey` | `string` | Access key of 5 to 20 characters in length that clients use to access the server. This overrides the access key that is generated by minio on first startup and stored inside the `configDir` directory. |
| `services.minio.browser` | `boolean` | Enable or disable access to web UI. |
| `services.minio.certificatesDir` | `absolute path` | The directory where TLS certificates are stored. |
| `services.minio.configDir` | `absolute path` | The config directory, for the access keys and other settings. |
| `services.minio.consoleAddress` | `string` | IP address and port of the web UI (console). |
| `services.minio.dataDir` | `list of (absolute path or string)` | The list of data directories or nodes for storing the objects. Use one path for regular operation and the minimum of 4 endpoints for Erasure Code mode. |
| `services.minio.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Minio Object Storage. |
| `services.minio.listenAddress` | `string` | IP address and port of the server. |
| `services.minio.package` | `package` | The minio package to use. |
| `services.minio.region` | `string` | The physical location of the server. By default it is set to us-east-1, which is same as AWS S3's and Minio's default region. |
| `services.minio.rootCredentialsFile` | `null or absolute path` | File containing the MINIO_ROOT_USER, default is "minioadmin", and MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD (length >= 8), default is "minioadmin"; in the format of an EnvironmentFile=, as described by {manpage}`systemd.exec(5)`. |
| `services.minio.secretKey` | `string` | Specify the Secret key of 8 to 40 characters in length that clients use to access the server. This overrides the secret key that is generated by minio on first startup and stored inside the `configDir` directory. |
